c.d: Average user ratings or scores assigned to movies by app users to express their opinion.
Written feedback provided by users about movies, useful for qualitative assessment.
Effectiveness of the app’s movie recommendation algorithm in suggesting relevant movies based on user taste.
Ability to follow friends, share ratings, get group recommendations, and interact with community.
Number of movies/shows covered and availability of metadata such as genres, release date, streaming platforms.
Availability of the app on major mobile platforms (iOS, Android).
Number of active users or downloads indicating app popularity and data richness.
Presence of in-app purchases or ads that might affect the user experience.
